steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Good morning!

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Good morning! How are you?

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: I am fine.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: That is good. Did you sleep well?

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Yes, I slept well.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Nice! What time did you wake up?

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: I woke up at 7 o’clock.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: That is good. I woke up at 6 o’clock.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Oh nice! What did you do first?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: First, I brushed my teeth.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you use toothpaste?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I used toothpaste and a brush.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Good! What did you do after that?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I washed my face.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you open the window?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I opened the window for fresh air.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: That is nice. Did you drink water?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I drank a glass of water.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What did you eat for breakfast?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I ate bread and butter.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you drink milk?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I drank a glass of milk.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Who was sitting on the chair near you?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: My mother was sitting on the chair.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you close the door before leaving?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I closed the door.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you pack your school bag?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I packed my books and pencil box.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: How did you go to school?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I went by school bus.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Who sits next to you in class?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: My friend Rahul sits next to me.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What is on your table?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: My book, pen, and water bottle are on my table.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you write with a pencil or pen?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I wrote with a pencil.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you talk to your teacher?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I asked my teacher a question.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What did you ask?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I asked about homework.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What did you do after school?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I played with my ball.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you sit on a chair or on the floor?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I sat on the floor.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you watch TV?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I watched TV for some time.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What did you watch?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I watched a cartoon.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you help at home?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I helped to clean the table.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you open the door for someone?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I opened the door for my father.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What did you eat at night?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I ate rice and vegetables.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you wash your hands before eating?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I washed my hands with soap.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you drink water after food?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I drank water.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What did you do before sleeping?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I brushed my teeth again.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you close the window?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I closed the window.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you switch off the light?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I switched off the light.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Did you keep your bag near the chair?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Yes, I kept my bag near the chair.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: What time did you sleep?

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: I slept at 9 o’clock.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: I am feeling sleepy.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Did you brush your teeth?

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Yes, I did.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Did you close the door?

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Not yet.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Please close the door.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Okay, I closed it.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Did you switch off the fan?

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Yes, I switched it off.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: Good. Now you can sleep.

steps.speaker: bot
steps.text: Thank you for talking to me.

steps.speaker: user
steps.text: You are welcome. See you tomorrow!
